questions: What are the most famous myths?
answers: Mythology is a collection of stories and legends from ancient cultures that explain natural phenomena, human nature, and the origins of the world. Greek, Norse, Hindu, and Egyptian mythologies are among the most well-known.
Greek mythology features gods like Zeus, Athena, and Poseidon living on Mount Olympus. Norse mythology has Odin, Thor, and Loki. Hindu mythology includes vast epics like the Ramayana and Mahabharata.

Mythology encompasses ancient stories about gods, heroes, and creation. These myths served as early explanations for nature, morality, and human existence. Every major civilization developed its own mythological traditions that continue to influence art and literature today.
